channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pothole approx 4 inches deep and 20 inches wide, 3rd March
item.description:
Whittington road cheltenham near lights going onto golden valley. Multiple potholes and very hard to avoid where cars park on both sides of the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Whittington Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive Rubbish and car debris on verge, 3rd March
item.description:
A40 between Arle court roundabout and M5 junction
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned caravan, 3rd March
item.description:
Abandoned caravan in side road off Brookfield Road 300 yards east of the bridge over the M5 motorway. This has been here for a month or so.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookfield Road, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole, 3rd March
item.description:
On right side of road as u approach apple tree close junction from pottersfield road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pottersfield Road, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3/4 potholes on this road right on the bends, 3rd March
item.description:
Hayden road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Gloucester Road, Springbank, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 very large potholes, 3rd March
item.description:
On linden avenue jusr before broadway close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, Linden Avenue, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 12 inch pothole outside number 36 long mynd avenue, 3rd March
item.description:
The pothole is in the road outside number 36. Every time I drive in or reverse off the drive it is very hard to avoid it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Long Mynd Avenue, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign post with village way waymarkers missing, 3rd March
item.description:
Sign post with village way waymarkers missing. The original had corroded at ground level and has been removed. As yet no replacement signage has been reinstated, pointing to Woolstone, Cheltenham and Gotherington
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 91, Malleson Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is missing (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Previous FixMyStreet ref: 8477084 repair has failed, 3rd March
item.description:
Previous FixMyStreet ref: 8477084 repair has failed. Unsurprisingly the cement slither added to the corner to stop the rocking of the kerbstone, that also squits water up when it has rained has failed. Therefore kerbstone back to having rocking movement, mulching up water when raining etc. The solution here is ideally a replacement as daily farm vehicle traffic continually mounts the kerb due to the width of the road when both sides of the road have passing vehicles. This is also a tyre puncture risk.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gretton Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Temporary road barrier lying in the road causing an obstruction. Very hard to see when entering Painswick Road off Suffolk Road, 3rd March
item.description:
Beside the entrance into Painswick House Dental Practice in Painswick Road just off Suffolk Road in Cheltenham
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Painswick Road, Tivoli, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Flytipped items, 3rd March
item.description:
Items may be due for collection or could be flytipped. There is a TV stand, some blag bags, and a large chair further down the alley off Dunalley Parade

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Dunalley Parade, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All the manhole covers rattle, 3rd March
item.description:
Multiple manhole covers rattle, make noise and move.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2-4, Cheltenham Road East, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two potholes, 3rd March
item.description:
These two potholes are located right on the junction as you turn left off the A40 onto the A436
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Shipton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 3rd March
item.description:
Potholes as you approach mini round about on Malvern Road. Getting deeper by the day.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Malvern Road, Lansdown, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No visibility, 3rd March
item.description:
When entering the walls factory, the sign on the road which tells of planned road works is blocking visibility. Anyone in a car leaving the factory can’t see if there’s any oncoming traffic. We’ve had reports of near misses and this will cause an accident if not moved.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Corinium Avenue, Barnwood, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Only fixed half?, 3rd March
item.description:
You’ve filled in some pot holes but left loads? The pot hole are over two old speed bumps (I think) the road needs to be fully resurfaced and speed bumps replaced (given two schools on the road).
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Malvern Road, Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 3rd March
item.description:
PERM REPAIR job 43118249: pothole
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unpermitted roadworks problem, 3rd March
item.description:
Please see attached from MP Rec 03.03.2026 - 15:38
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Almost the whole length of the A46 from Brockworth X Hands to Fiddlers Elbow requires resurfacing. The surface is so broken that it becoming impossible to keep momentum on a road bike., 3rd March
item.description:
Climb to Fiddlers Elbow A46
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Painswick Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Only one of the many potholes has been repaired., 3rd March
item.description:
This morning a team arrived at 10:00. They spent fifteen minutes failing to repair the pothole at the end of Bayshill Lane, at least 90 minutes chatting with the engineer running and then 30 minutes repairing only one in a long string of potholes on Bayshill Road. These potholes, and those on the others side of the road have been there for well over two years.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bayshill Road, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
